_notice: SYNTHETIC — FAKE COMPLIANCE TEST DATA, NOT REAL — benign look-alikes; a correct detector flags NONE of these.

cases.text: Employee badge 123-45-6789 printed at reception.
cases.note: 3-2-4 shape but not in the 900 range -> not an SSN/national id

cases.text: Support ticket ref 456-78-9012 archived.
cases.note: ordinary 3-2-4 reference, non-900

cases.text: Asset tag 1042-7745-8035 in the register.
cases.note: 4-4-4 grouping but leading digit is not 9

cases.text: Order number 1234 5678 9012 3458 shipped Tuesday.
cases.note: 16 digits but fails the Luhn check -> not a card number

cases.text: Device serial 4000111122223333 registered.
cases.note: 16-digit serial, non-Luhn

cases.text: Guest assigned to room 123 for the night.
cases.note: bare 3 digits with no cvv/cvc label

cases.text: Please contact jordan@example.org for the report.
cases.note: example.org, not the reserved example.com the detector keys on

cases.text: Distribution alias team@sample.test on record.
cases.note: non-example.com domain

cases.text: Reception line (212) 867-5309, ask for dispatch.
cases.note: not in the 555-01xx fiction range or the UK drama range

cases.text: Old demo line 555-0299 has been retired.
cases.note: 555-02xx, outside the reserved 555-01xx block

cases.text: Firmware build v256.300.1.4 rolled out.
cases.note: octets exceed 255 -> not a valid IPv4 address

cases.text: Rack position 10.20.30 on the floor plan.
cases.note: only three octets -> not an IPv4 address

cases.text: Nightly backup finished at 12:34:56 UTC.
cases.note: clock time: 2 colon groups, no :: compression

cases.text: Cache tag de:ad:be:ef logged for the node.
cases.note: only 4 hex groups -> not a full 6-octet MAC (and not IPv6)

cases.text: Debug pointer at 0x1a2b3c logged during the crash.
cases.note: 0x + short hex -> a memory pointer, not a 40-hex wallet address

cases.text: Commit 0xdeadbeef tagged in the release notes.
cases.note: 0x + 8 hex -> a short hash, not a 40-hex wallet address

cases.text: The vin lookup service returned no record today.
cases.note: the word 'vin' with no following 17-char VIN

cases.text: Please swift-track the shipment to the loading dock.
cases.note: 'swift' as an adjective, no BIC code following

cases.text: Stored the -----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY----- in the vault.
cases.note: a PUBLIC key header is not a private key

cases.text: Enrolled in medicare part b for 2026 coverage.
cases.note: 'medicare' as a program name, no 11-char MBI following

cases.text: Patient medicare information was updated in the portal.
cases.note: 'medicare information' (lowercase prose) is not an uppercase MBI

cases.text: We expect a swift response from the vendor team.
cases.note: 'swift response' (lowercase) is not an uppercase BIC code

cases.text: Job vin lookupabcdefgh1234567 processed overnight.
cases.note: a lowercase 17-char slug after 'vin' is not an uppercase VIN

cases.text: SSH host fingerprint 43:51:43:a1:b5:fc:8b:b7:0a:3a logged.
cases.note: 10-octet colon-hex fingerprint -> neither a 6-octet MAC nor IPv6

cases.text: Refactored the parser around namespace Foo::bar1 last week.
cases.note: C++/log scope resolution X::Y, not an IPv6 :: compression

cases.text: The logger prints std::deadbeef when the cache key is missing.
cases.note: std::<hex-ish word> scope resolution, not IPv6

cases.text: Warehouse aisle 011000015 restocked.
cases.note: 9 digits with no routing/aba label

cases.text: Locker combination 000123456789 reset.
cases.note: 12-digit code with no account label

cases.text: Invoice 12-3456789 marked settled today.
cases.note: NN-NNNNNNN shape with no EIN/employer-id label

cases.text: Purchase order 34-7654321 approved by finance.
cases.note: NN-NNNNNNN shape, no EIN label (non-9 prefix so it is not a 900-range id)

cases.text: Blood was drawn from a vein; sample 12-3456789 went to the lab.
cases.note: the word 'vein' ends in 'ein' but is not an EIN label (word-boundary guard)

cases.text: Batch 1234567890 completed processing overnight.
cases.note: 10-digit batch id with no NPI label

cases.text: Model B20 and unit I10 are back in stock.
cases.note: letter+2-digit codes with no clinical context

cases.text: Grid reference A15 is marked on the map.
cases.note: map grid ref, ICD-10 shape but no diagnosis/code context

cases.text: Front desk wrote down the area code A15 by mistake.
cases.note: 'area code' is a non-clinical 'code' phrase -> not a diagnosis code

cases.text: Warehouse says product code B20 is out of stock.
cases.note: 'product code' is non-clinical -> not a diagnosis code

cases.text: The nightly service returned error code E11 twice.
cases.note: 'error code' is non-clinical -> not a diagnosis code

cases.text: Your confirmation code B20 was emailed to you.
cases.note: 'confirmation code' is transactional; only clinical 'code' phrases count

cases.text: The tracking code B20 shows the parcel in transit.
cases.note: 'tracking code' is non-clinical -> not a diagnosis code

cases.text: Timesheet lists job code E44 for the shift.
cases.note: 'job code' is non-clinical -> not a diagnosis code

cases.text: Patient satisfaction survey completed this week.
cases.note: mentions 'patient' but carries no diagnosis or record marker

cases.text: Shelf MRN reference table on aisle 4.
cases.note: the letters MRN with no following 8-digit number

cases.text: The kickoff meeting is set for 2024-03-15.
cases.note: ISO date with no DOB/birth-date label

cases.text: Seat D1234567 assigned for the conference.
cases.note: letter+7-digit seat id with no driver-license label

cases.text: North bay inventory restocked, SKU ref ABC-12345.
cases.note: 3 letters + 5 digits -> neither passport nor insurance-member shape

cases.text: Production run sealed and labeled, batch ref DE-12345.
cases.note: 2 letters + 5 digits, short of the VAT 8-12 digit length

cases.text: The memo notes the regional office code GB29.
cases.note: IBAN-style prefix but far too short to be an IBAN

cases.text: Circulated for review this week: draft doc CT-24-99.
cases.note: resembles a contract id but the field widths do not match

cases.text: Kept the loading dock clear near storage bin PN-99.
cases.note: PN- prefix but only two trailing chars

cases.text: Ground crew kept clear the loading lane PRG-99.
cases.note: PRG- prefix but too short for a program code

cases.text: Left as a stub in the sample config: label AKIB1234.
cases.note: AKIB, not the AKIA prefix the detector keys on

cases.text: Sample token sk_demo_abc123 used in the tutorial.
cases.note: sk_demo, not the sk_test_/sk_live_ prefix

cases.text: Log fragment eyJhbGci truncated by the collector.
cases.note: a single base64 segment, not three dot-joined JWT segments

cases.text: Cut the gh-release-42 tag on the repo.
cases.note: gh- prefix but not a ghp_/ghs_ personal access token

cases.text: Vault rotation used passphrase hunter3 this cycle.
cases.note: hunter3 is not on the deterministic-hash denylist (hunter2 is)

cases.text: Posted the notes in channel xox-general.
cases.note: xox- without the b/p/o/r/s type char and length of a real token

cases.text: Left the AIza-short placeholder in the sample config.
cases.note: AIza prefix but far short of the 35-char key body

cases.text: Renamed the sk-notes file in the shared drive.
cases.note: sk- followed by a short word, not a 20+ char key body
